'''âth-z-d''' ('''kathazad''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:waffle|waffle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-z-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:waffle|waffle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âth-z-d
|-
! Lemma
| kathazad
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithazad|thithazad]] || [[word:jithazad|jithazad]] || [[word:shithazad|shithazad]] || [[word:kithazad|kithazad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthazad|thuthuthazad]] || [[word:jujuthazad|jujuthazad]] || [[word:shushuthazad|shushuthazad]] || [[word:kukuthazad|kukuthazad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthazad|thuthazad]] || [[word:juthazad|juthazad]] || [[word:shuthazad|shuthazad]] || [[word:kuthazad|kuthazad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthazad|thuthazad]] || [[word:juthazad|juthazad]] || [[word:shuthazad|shuthazad]] || [[word:kuthazad|kuthazad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thethazad|thethazad]] || [[word:jethazad|jethazad]] || [[word:shethazad|shethazad]] || [[word:kethazad|kethazad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothothazad|thothothazad]] || [[word:jojothazad|jojothazad]] || [[word:shoshothazad|shoshothazad]] || [[word:kokothazad|kokothazad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothazad|thothazad]] || [[word:jothazad|jothazad]] || [[word:shothazad|shothazad]] || [[word:kothazad|kothazad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothazad|thothazad]] || [[word:jothazad|jothazad]] || [[word:shothazad|shothazad]] || [[word:kothazad|kothazad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠthazad|thĂŠthazad]] || [[word:jĂŠthazad|jĂŠthazad]] || [[word:shĂŠthazad|shĂŠthazad]] || [[word:kĂŠthazad|kĂŠthazad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathathazad|thathathazad]] || [[word:jajathazad|jajathazad]] || [[word:shashathazad|shashathazad]] || [[word:kakathazad|kakathazad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathazad|thathazad]] || [[word:jathazad|jathazad]] || [[word:shathazad|shathazad]] || [[word:kathazad|kathazad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathazad|thathazad]] || [[word:jathazad|jathazad]] || [[word:shathazad|shathazad]] || [[word:kathazad|kathazad]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shathazad|shathazad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshathazad|goshathazad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishathazad|gokishathazad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shathazadnĂŒ|shathazadnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshathazadnknĂŒ|goshathazadnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishathazadnĂŒ|gokishathazadnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shathazadshĂ«|shathazadshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshathazadnkshĂ«|goshathazadnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishathazadshĂ«|gokishathazadshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathazadro|shathazadro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathazadnkro|goshathazadnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathazadro|gokishathazadro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shathazadmu|shathazadmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathazadnkmu|goshathazadnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathazadmu|gokishathazadmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shathazadsher|shathazadsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshathazadnksher|goshathazadnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishathazadsher|gokishathazadsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shathazadng|shathazadng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshathazadnkng|goshathazadnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishathazadng|gokishathazadng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shathazadya|shathazadya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshathazadnkya|goshathazadnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishathazadya|gokishathazadya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shathazadyam|shathazadyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshathazadnkyam|goshathazadnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishathazadyam|gokishathazadyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathazadnĂŒshĂ«|shathazadnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathazadnknĂŒshĂ«|goshathazadnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathazadnĂŒshĂ«|gokishathazadnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathazadnĂŒro|shathazadnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathazadnknĂŒro|goshathazadnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathazadnĂŒro|gokishathazadnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathazadnĂŒmu|shathazadnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathazadnknĂŒmu|goshathazadnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathazadnĂŒmu|gokishathazadnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathazadshĂ«nĂŒ|shathazadshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathazadnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshathazadnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathazadshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishathazadshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathazadshĂ«ro|shathazadshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathazadnkshĂ«ro|goshathazadnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathazadshĂ«ro|gokishathazadshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathazadshĂ«mu|shathazadshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathazadnkshĂ«mu|goshathazadnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathazadshĂ«mu|gokishathazadshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathazadronĂŒ|shathazadronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathazadnkronĂŒ|goshathazadnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathazadronĂŒ|gokishathazadronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathazadroshĂ«|shathazadroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathazadnkroshĂ«|goshathazadnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathazadroshĂ«|gokishathazadroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathazadromu|shathazadromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathazadnkromu|goshathazadnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathazadromu|gokishathazadromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathazadmunĂŒ|shathazadmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathazadnkmunĂŒ|goshathazadnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathazadmunĂŒ|gokishathazadmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathazadmushĂ«|shathazadmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathazadnkmushĂ«|goshathazadnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathazadmushĂ«|gokishathazadmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathazadmuro|shathazadmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathazadnkmuro|goshathazadnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathazadmuro|gokishathazadmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
